plays.playDescription: (14:55) D.McNabb pass to T.Pinkston to NO 37 for 48 yards (A.Ambrose). With this completion, McNabb tied a team record with 13 straight completions. Last week he had completed his final 12 passes against the Giants. He tied Bobby Hoying's team record previously set in 1997 at Baltimore.
